focus_points.label: Making the quality bar concrete with examples
focus_points.reason: What “good” looks like in practice for Carlos right now, using concrete examples so feedback doesn’t stay abstract.

focus_points.label: Whether prior feedback changed his behavior
focus_points.reason: What prior feedback he actually translated into new habits or outputs, and where it stayed at the level of ideas.

focus_points.label: His definition of good work at this level
focus_points.reason: What he thinks the bar is for his junior role, so you can calibrate expectations against his current mental model.

focus_points.label: Near-term growth focus and what blocks it
focus_points.reason: How to turn growth into one specific practice for the next cycle, and what feels blocked so the plan is actionable.
